name: @emdzej/nfsx-fsc
description: FSC + cert + identity host orchestrator for nfsx. Wraps @emdzej/nfsx-runtime with high-level FscManager operations (checkFsc / getFsc / getVin / getFsStatus / …) over the 00swt*.ipo CABI surface. The TypeScript equivalent of winkfpt's coapiKf* C functions, scoped to the FSC + cert + identity subset.
